collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (14 total Queries, 14 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: UPDATE `campaigns` SET `title` = 'Solar Lamps for Sitio Pag-asa', `description` = 'Help us install durable solar lamps for 120 households in Sitio Pag-asa so students can study at night and families can stay safe during power interruptions.', `goal_amount` = 85000, `image` = 'ai-solar-lamps-sitio-pagasa.svg', `current_amount` = 14500, `deadline` = '2026-05-03' WHERE `id` = '4'

UPDATE `campaigns` SET `title` = 'School Supplies for Barangay Malaya', `description` = 'Provide notebooks, pencils, and hygiene kits for 60 students in Barangay Malaya before the next school quarter starts.', `goal_amount` = 1800, `image` = 'ai-school-supplies-malaya.svg', `current_amount` = 350, `deadline` = '2026-04-08' WHERE `id` = '5'

UPDATE `campaigns` SET `title` = 'Medicines for Lola Rosa', `description` = 'Support a one-month maintenance medicine pack for Lola Rosa, a senior citizen managing hypertension and diabetes.', `goal_amount` = 1200, `image` = 'ai-medicines-lola-rosa.svg', `current_amount` = 900, `deadline` = '2026-03-31' WHERE `id` = '6'

UPDATE `campaigns` SET `title` = 'Rice Packs for 20 Families', `description` = 'Fund rice and canned goods for 20 families affected by recent flooding in low-lying areas.', `goal_amount` = 2000, `image` = 'ai-rice-packs-families.svg', `current_amount` = 2000, `deadline` = '2026-03-24' WHERE `id` = '7'

UPDATE `campaigns` SET `title` = 'Community First Aid Refill', `description` = 'Restock first aid essentials including bandages, antiseptics, and basic emergency medicines for barangay responders.', `goal_amount` = 1500, `image` = 'ai-community-first-aid.svg', `current_amount` = 250, `deadline` = '2026-04-02' WHERE `id` = '8'

UPDATE `campaigns` SET `title` = 'Typhoon Shelter Repair Fund', `description` = 'Repair damaged roofing panels and walling in an evacuation center used by families during storms.', `goal_amount` = 25000, `image` = 'ai-typhoon-shelter-repair.svg', `current_amount` = 8000, `deadline` = '2026-03-09' WHERE `id` = '9'
